gaps.name: High-Tension Elegant Light
gaps.desc: A punishing push-your-luck or time-pressure game with minimal rules. B2-driven but learnable in 5 min. No clear example in corpus.

gaps.name: High-Interaction Low-Architecture
gaps.desc: Maximum direct player contest without production depth. Like Crokinole but with more strategic range — a competitive dexterity game with genuine strategic ergodicity.

gaps.name: Deep-Architecture Highly-Forgiving
gaps.desc: Le Havre depth but highly forgiving — a deep Euro where mistakes are recoverable. Currently all high-G games are also high-T (punishing). This region is empty.

gaps.name: High-Elegance High-Range Abstract
gaps.desc: Maximally elegant AND maximally ergodic. Dominion approaches this but has low I. Codenames approaches this but has low R. The combination is unexplored.
